_publications._publicationTitle: Re-evaluation of missense variant classifications in NF2.

_contextSnippet: Evidence of mutational hotspots and functional domains (PM1), was not applied to any of the variants in this study as no specific structural domains of NF2 display missense constraint in DECIPHER
details: No specific structural domains of NF2 display missense constraint in DECIPHER, limiting application of mutational hotspot evidence
